response:
MOORE
SOME EXPERTS SPECULATE THAT MOORE'S LAW WILL CEASE TO HOLD TRUE AROUND THE YEAR 2025 OR 2030 DUE TO PHYSICAL LIMITS IN TRANSISTOR SIZING AND HEAT DISSIPATION ISSUES THAT CURRENT SILICON TECHNOLOGY CANNOT OVERCOME.
***
OTHER ANALYSTS ARGUE THAT THE LAW WILL EFFECTIVELY END SOONER, WITHIN THE NEXT FIVE YEARS, AS THE COST OF ADVANCED LITHOGRAPHY BECOMES PROHIBITIVE FOR MANY MANUFACTURERS, FORCING THE INDUSTRY TO SHIFT TOWARD NEW ARCHITECTURES LIKE 3D STACKING OR QUANTUM COMPUTING INSTEAD OF CONTINUING PURE SCALING.
MOORE
